title: Gem Text
description: A texture pack to make remembering gemstones on Hypixel skyblock easier.
body:
Makes gemstones on Hypixel skyblock easier to tell apart by using text. This can be useful if you are colour blind or struggle remembering the gemstone colors.

# 📖 What does it do?
The texture pack changes all tinted glass to have the first the letters of its gemstone type.
This has been done to:
- Black - Onyx
- Blue - Aquamarine
- Brown - Citrine
- Green - Peridot
- Light Blue - Sapphire
- Lime - Jade
- Magenta - Jasper
- Orange - Amber
- Purple - Amethyst
- Red - Ruby
- White - Opal
- Yellow - Topaz

# ✅ Version Compatibility
Should work for any version 1.16.5 and up.

# 🐛 How to Report Issues
Please use the issues channel in the discord linked at the top of the page to report issues. Make sure you include information about what version of minecraft and the texture packs you are using.
